prose: Use an A-shaped hand at the forehead, palm facing the signer, thumb pointing up. The hand taps the forehead twice.

gaps.reason: 'A-shaped hand' is ambiguous between the ASL 'A' (closed fist, thumb alongside) and the BSL/DGS 'A' (flat hand, thumb extended) — the latter is the 'flathand with extended thumb' compound in HamNoSys
gaps.suggested_question: Which A do you mean — the closed-fist A (thumb alongside the closed fingers) or the flat-hand A (fingers flat, thumb extended up)?
